steps: Mix together: 3μl Restriction endonuclease 1 3μl Restriction endonuclease 2 6μl 10xgreen buffer 3000ng DNA Add to 60μl dd H 2 O If it is double enzyme digestion verification before sequencing: 1μl Restriction endonuclease 1 1μl Restriction endonuclease 2 1μl 10xgreen buffer 7μl DNA
Heat in water bath or heat block at 37℃ for 30min-1h. 37 °C
